title: Performance
description: The system MUST respond to user requests within 2 seconds under normal load.

title: Reliability
description: The system SHALL ensure that all transactions are processed reliably without data loss.

title: Security
description: The system MUST secure payment transactions and protect sensitive user information.

title: Scalability
description: The system SHOULD handle a high number of concurrent users during peak times without performance degradation.

title: Availability
description: The system SHALL be available 99.9% of the time to ensure continuous service.

title: Usability
description: The system MUST provide an intuitive and user-friendly interface for customers.

title: Maintainability
description: The system SHOULD be easy to maintain, update, and extend by developers.

title: Compatibility
description: The system MUST be compatible with multiple browsers and mobile devices.

title: Integration
description: The system SHOULD integrate with external payment gateways and shipping services.
